testcase.name: Successful Login with Valid Credentials
testcase.system-out: Given User launches Chrome browser..........................................passed When user opens URL "https://admin-demo.nopcommerce.com/login"..............passed And user enters Email as "admin@yourstore.com" and Password as "admin"......passed And Clicks on Login.........................................................passed Then Page Title should be "Dashboard / nopCommerce administration"..........passed When User clicks on Logout link.............................................passed Then Page Title should be "nopCommerce demo store. Login"...................passed And Close Browser...........................................................passed

testcase.name: Unsuccessful Login with invalid Credentials
testcase.system-out: Given User launches Chrome browser..........................................passed When user opens URL "https://admin-demo.nopcommerce.com/login"..............passed And user enters Email as "123123admin@yourstore.com" and Password as "adminkjhljh".passed And Clicks on Login.........................................................passed Then user should see error message "Login was unsuccessful. Please correct the errors and try again. No customer account found".passed And Close Browser...........................................................passed

testcase.name: Successful Login with Valid Credentials - #1.1
testcase.system-out: Given User launches Chrome browser..........................................passed When user opens URL "https://admin-demo.nopcommerce.com/login"..............passed And user enters Email as "admin@yourstore.com" and Password as "admin"......passed And Clicks on Login.........................................................passed Then Page Title should be "Dashboard / nopCommerce administration"..........passed When User clicks on Logout link.............................................passed Then Page Title should be "nopCommerce demo store. Login"...................passed And Close Browser...........................................................passed
